morningBrief.headline: Variable Conditions
morningBrief.body: Steady snowfall with 10" over the last week. Peak terrain status: almost everything is available today. It's going to be a mixed bag today. Expect rain below and snow above.

morningBrief.headline: The Base Is Holding Up
morningBrief.body: The 13.4" from this week is still skiing great. No new snow needed (yet). The whole mountain is basically open. Go explore.

morningBrief.headline: Rain at Base, Snow Up Top
morningBrief.body: The mountain got a nice 1.6" touch-up. Expect improved conditions. Nearly full mountain access with 167 of 170 trails spinning. Transition weather: rain turning to snow as you climb. Variable conditions throughout.

trends: Great week for snow - 13" in last 7 days

morningBrief.headline: Recent Snow Still Skiing Well
morningBrief.body: Holding steady - that 13" base from recent storms is doing the heavy lifting.
